case_title: BISEK, NEA VS KNAPP, JOHN C/O KNAPP DIRECT MARKETING

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, JOHN C/O KNAPP DIRECT MARKETING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY BISEK, NEA AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, JOHN C/O KNAPP DIRECT MARKETING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,283.37 AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, JOHN C/O KNAPP DIRECT MARKETING

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BISEK, NEA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNAPP, JOHN C/O KNAPP DIRECT MARKETING $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO JOHN KNAPP RETURNED SIGNED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KNAPP, JOHN C/O KNAPP DIRECT MARKETING
